title: If the economy is good, why don't we feel it?
section_path: If the economy is good, why don't we feel it?
section_path_text: If the economy is good, why don't we feel it?
summary:
Main
The four things investors need to know this week:
Mazars is now Forvis Mazars . The global economy lacks a clear direction, causing central banks and markets ambiguity
As long as the Fed remains unclear about the potential for further tightening, markets will likely remain nervous. This market offers very few tactical opportunities, as a lack of clear direction is accompanied by low volatility.
